name: thesis-writer
description: Plan-driven doctoral thesis writing with Zotero research and citations.

interface.shortDescription: Plan-driven doctoral thesis writing with Zotero research and citations.
interface.longDescription: A dual-vendor thesis writing plugin with collaborative planning, Zotero-grounded research, LaTeX authoring, figures, formatting, review, and authorship logging.
defaultPrompt: Plan a thesis chapter with Zotero evidence.
Write an approved thesis section in LaTeX.
Review a chapter against its approved plan.
